div.h2: Join Order DP — 3-Table Query: A ⋈ B ⋈ C

g.text: LEVEL 3 — Full 3-Table Plan (try all splits of A,B,C)
no usable index on join key
OPTIMAL JOIN ORDER: B -> C -> A
Exponential Growth — Why DP Caps at ~10 Tables
N=5: 120 orderings 2^5=32 subsets fast with DP
DP Time: O(3^N) vs Exhaustive: O(N!) -> DP wins up to N~10-12
Beyond N=10: switch to GREEDY or GENETIC heuristics
